title: Land & Water Tray
description: A Montessori landform tray game where kids place land and water pieces to make island, lake, peninsula, and bay forms.
learningGoals: Recognize land and water as contrasting parts
Build simple landforms from spatial arrangements
Hear concise definitions for island, lake, peninsula, and bay
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap land and water tiles onto tray ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct land or water tiles pop, sparkle, and speak the part name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds speak the landform definition.

modes.title: Make the Landform
modes.skill: landform concepts from land and water arrangements

credits: Kaigani; placeholder emoji land and water tiles rendered by the shared build-assemble engine. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
